### Props

| Name          | Type      | Required | Default | Description                                                                                                       |
| ------------- | --------- | -------- | ------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `visible`     | `boolean` |          | `false` | Controls panel visibility                                                                                         |
| `streamState` | `object`  | тЬУ        | тАФ       | Stream state object from useAiChatStream().state. Contains: isStreaming, currentText, toolCalls, error, messages. |
| `fabRef`      | `object`  |          | `null`  | Ref to the FAB element тАФ kept for API back-compat, focus return is handled by NcAppSidebar.                       |

| Name                | Payload | Description |
| ------------------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `close`             | тАФ       |             |
| `send`              | тАФ       |             |
